events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: residential job, concrete & masonry, form build & bracing, observed field condition: blowout evidence, rough-complete, reference ACI 347. Need decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant? Blowout evidence means concrete form blowout likely occurred or imminent. Form build & bracing defective. Need percent complete roughly 70 until defects corrected. Risk high/critical? Blowout evidence is critical safety hazard. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant maybe. Findings: evidence of form blowout, inadequate bracing/staking, forms not capable of resisting concrete pressure. Actions: immediate stop work, inspect all forms and braces, repair/replace failed sections, add ties/walers/bracing per ACI 347, re-inspect before pour. references ACI 347. Need include all fields. value 0. sound_source etc default empty? Schema says string for sound_source, event_time, rate numeric, order list, workable list. We can set sound_source: "", event_time: 0.0, rate: 0.0, order: [], workable: []. confidence maybe 0.9. Need ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Evidence of form blowout observed on the roughed-in formwork",
    "Forms and/or bracing are not resisting concrete lateral pressure as required",
    "Blowout indicates insufficient ties, walers, stakes, or alignment",
    "Condition creates imminent safety hazard and risk of concrete failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately and secure the area",
    "Inspect all form panels, ties, walers, stakes, and braces for damage or displacement",
    "Remove and replace any failed, cracked, bowed, or separated form components",
    "Add adequate form ties, bracing, and supports per ACI 347 and manufacturer instructions",
    "Re-inspect and obtain approval before any concrete placement"
  ],
  "rationale": "Blowout evidence on formwork is a critical defect indicating the forms and bracing cannot safely contain the concrete load. ACI 347 requires formwork to be designed and built to resist all applied loads without failure. Until the blowout cause is corrected and the forms re-inspected, the work is non-compliant and unsafe to proceed.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347"
  ]
}
